title: MultipassVm
description: Declares a Multipass virtual machine. Synthesizes a YAML configuration file committed to the repository.

image.description: Ubuntu image alias or remote path (e.g. '22.04', 'jammy').

bridged.description: Whether to add a bridged network interface.

networks.description: Network interfaces to attach. Each entry is a reference to an MltNetwork resource via resource.ref.

mounts.description: Host-to-guest directory mounts. Each entry is a reference to an MltMount resource via resource.ref.
